steps.title: Spot the defining phrase
steps.content: The phrase “straddle the line between prose and poetry” signals that these forms resist clear categorization.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Amorphous means lacking a clear, defined shape—fitting for forms that don't belong to one singular genre. The other choices either denote something recognizable (customary), suggest indifference (neutral), or reference scattered distribution (dispersed). This matches choice A — A is correct.
